utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all seven items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic); travel_dates (July 20–24, 2024); transportation (airline, route, schedule, total_cost provided); accommodation (hotel name, address, details, total_cost provided); activities (specific list of activities, even if costs not individually listed but covered under total_budget); additional_services (two services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown €1,390 confirmed). Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which has a rating of 7 in the ground truth. The transportation used is 'Czech Wings (Economy Class)', which corresponds to a standard airline in Economy Class with a rating of 7. The accommodation is 'Historic Lodge (3★)', which directly matches an entry in the accommodation table with a rating of 7. The listed activities are 'Old Town walking tour' (mapped to 'City Walking Tour', rating 9), 'Prague Zoo visit' (mapped to 'Zoo', rating 9), 'Castle District tour & boat cruise' (the 'tour' part matches 'City Walking Tour' with rating 9, and the 'boat cruise' is not explicitly listed but closest in physical/experience type are moderate family cultural activities, so we use 'Sailing Course' as the closest analog with rating 8), 'Street Art tour' (rating 8), and 'Family dinners at selected restaurants' (which aligns with 'Indian Cuisine' as the family’s preferred type, rating 10). The additional services include 'airport_taxi_transfer' (mapped to 'Airport Taxi', rating 10) and 'virtual_personal_assistant' (rating 8).
